_comment: Merge this into ~/.claude/settings.json (or .claude/settings.json). Two deterministic backstops: (1) UserPromptSubmit fires the deep-audit fan-out when you ask for a multi-file audit, instead of relying on the skill self-triggering (which under-fires); (2) PostToolUse runs your project's tests after every code edit, so verify-before-done is enforced mechanically, not left to memory. Adjust the absolute hook paths for your machine (install.sh --with-hooks writes them for you).
